ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transportation_legs" (
  "leg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation leg */,
  "from_location" TEXT /* Origin point of the transportation leg */,
  "to_location" TEXT /* Destination point of the transportation leg */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Average speed for this leg in km/h */,
  "planned_time" INTEGER /* Planned time for this leg in hours */,
  "leg_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the leg in the journey */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the leg in kilometers */,
  "actual_time" INTEGER /* Actual time taken for the leg in hours */,
  "mode_of_transport" TEXT /* Mode of transport for the leg */,
  "fuel_consumption" INTEGER /* Fuel consumption for the leg in liters */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver assigned to the leg */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_legs_from_location FOREIGN KEY ("from_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_legs_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_legs_to_location FOREIGN KEY ("to_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., warehouse, customer) */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., origin, destination, transit) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, van) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the vehicle in kg */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status of the vehicle */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver currently assigned to the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "leg_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transportation leg for this shipment */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle used for this shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment is scheduled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the shipment in kg */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the shipment in cubic meters */,
  "shipment_value" INTEGER /* Value of the shipment */,
  "insurance_value" INTEGER /* Insured value of the shipment */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "recipient_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_leg_id FOREIGN KEY ("leg_id") REFERENCES transportation_legs ("leg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., logistics manager, driver, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
